title: Restore existing client selection in New Appointment dialog

requirements.text: Restore an "existing client" selection field in the "New appointment" flow so users can pick an already-created client record when creating a new appointment.

quotes: Maintenant dans la création de nouveau rendez-vous, le champ pour sélectionner un client existant à disparu, alors qu'il existait avant, il faut le remettre

acceptanceCriteria: When opening the AppointmentDialog in create mode (no existing appointment), a visible control exists to select an existing client from the current user's client records.
The client selection control is not shown (or is disabled) when editing an existing appointment, unless it previously existed in edit mode.

requirements.text: When an existing client is selected during appointment creation, automatically populate appointment form fields from that client record and keep the appointment tied to that client's reference.

quotes: le champ pour sélectionner un client existant... il faut le remettre

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting an existing client sets at minimum: referenceClient and nomClient in the form.
Selecting an existing client also populates other matching fields when available (e.g., phone number, address, service, notes) without preventing the user from editing appointment-specific fields.
The user can clear the selection to return to manual entry for a new/unlisted client.

requirements.text: Fix the create-appointment validation so selecting an existing client does not trigger the "duplicate reference" error, while still preventing accidental creation with a new reference that already exists.

quotes: le champ pour sélectionner un client existant...

acceptanceCriteria: If the user selected an existing client from the restored selector, the form can be submitted even though referenceClient matches an existing client record.

If the user did not select an existing client and manually enters a referenceClient that matches an existing client record (case-insensitive), the form submission is blocked with the existing duplicate-reference error behavior.
No backend changes are required to support this behavior (client records are loaded via the existing useGetAllClientRecords hook).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or anything in frontend/src/components/ui (compose existing components instead).
Maintain the single-actor backend architecture; do not introduce additional backend services/canisters.
Do not introduce external databases or third-party auth providers.
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall appointment creation UX beyond restoring the missing existing-client selector and its necessary validation/autofill logic.
Changing backend data models or performing state migrations.
